current.headline: De la Fuente Weighs Merino Start After Dramatic Belgium Winner
current.summary: Spain manager Luis de la Fuente is considering starting Mikel Merino in the World Cup semi-final against France, following his 88th-minute heroics to eliminate Belgium.

items.headline: Mbappé and Olise Lead Unbeaten France Into Dallas Semi-final
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé (8 goals) and playmaker Michael Olise (6 assists) prepare to lead France against Spain in Dallas. Les Bleus remain unbeaten after a 2-0 win over Morocco.

items.headline: Deschamps: Spain is the ultimate test for France's World Cup hopes
items.summary: Didier Deschamps paid tribute to Spain's tactical identity ahead of their semi-final showdown in Arlington, labeling Luis de la Fuente's side the most complete team in the tournament.
